records.ety: [F. artiste, LL. artista, fr. L. ars. See Art, n., and cf. Artiste.]

defs: One who practices some mechanic art or craft; an artisan.
quotes: How to build ships, and dreadful ordnance cast, Instruct the articles and reward their.

defs: One who professes and practices an art in which science and taste preside over the manual execution.
notes: ☞ The term is particularly applied to painters, sculptors, musicians, engravers, and architects.

defs: One who shows trained skill or rare taste in any manual art or occupation.
